case_title: CUSHING, JAMES VS WALD, MICHAEL E. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CUSHING, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT WALD, MICHAEL E. WALD, FREEMAN, CHAPMAN & BENDES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WALD, MICHAEL E. WALD, FREEMAN, CHAPMAN & BENDES AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CUSHING, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUSHING, JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WALD, MICHAEL E. WALD, FREEMAN, CHAPMAN & BENDES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WALD, FREEMAN, CHAPMAN & BENDES RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT CUSHING, JAMES $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
